---
title: "Lectures"
subtitle: "BMC201 - Web Technology"
---

## Course Lectures

This folder contains all lectures for BMC201 - Web Technology course.

### Week 1: Introduction to Web Development
- [Lecture 1: Introduction to Web Page Designing & Web Development Strategies](lecture-01.qmd)
- [Lecture 2: History of Web & Internet, Protocols Governing the Web](lecture-02.qmd)
- [Lecture 3: HTML Introduction & Basic Structure, HTML Tags](lecture-03.qmd)
- [Lecture 4: HTML Grouping: Div & Span](lecture-04.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 1-4)](/quiz/index.qmd)

### Week 2: HTML Forms & CSS
- [Lecture 5: HTML Lists (Ordered, Unordered, Description)](lecture-05.qmd)
- [Lecture 6: HTML Images & Hyperlinks](lecture-06.qmd)
- [Lecture 7: HTML Tables & Iframes](lecture-07.qmd)
- [Lecture 8: HTML Forms & Form Elements](lecture-08.qmd)

### Week 3: CSS Foundations
- [Lecture 9: CSS Introduction & CSS Syntax](lecture-09.qmd)
- [Lecture 10: External Style Sheets, Multiple Style Sheets](lecture-10.qmd)
- [Lecture 11: CSS Value Lengths, Percentages, Selectors](lecture-11.qmd)
- [Lecture 12: CSS Box Model, Float & Clear](lecture-12.qmd)

### Week 4: Bootstrap & JavaScript Basics
- [Lecture 13: Introduction to Bootstrap](lecture-13.qmd)
- [Lecture 14: Revision & Practical Exercise (HTML + CSS + Bootstrap)](lecture-14.qmd)
- [Lecture 15: Introduction to JavaScript & Variables](lecture-15.qmd)
- [Lecture 16: Functions in JavaScript & Returning Data](lecture-16.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 13-16)](/quiz/index.qmd)

### Weeks 6-7: Mid-Semester Exam Preparation
- [Revision: Unit I - Web Page Designing](revision-unit-1.qmd)
- [Revision: Unit II - JavaScript](revision-unit-2.qmd)

### Unit III: Servlet Foundations
- [Lecture 17: Servlet Overview & Architecture](lecture-17.qmd)
- [Lecture 18: Servlet Interface & Life Cycle](lecture-18.qmd)
- [Lecture 19: Handling HTTP GET & POST Requests](lecture-19.qmd)
- [Lecture 20: Redirecting Requests & Request Dispatching](lecture-20.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 17-20)](/quiz/index.qmd)

### Unit III: Session Tracking and JSP
- [Lecture 21: Session Tracking using Cookies](lecture-21.qmd)
- [Lecture 22: Session Tracking with HttpSession](lecture-22.qmd)
- [Lecture 23: JSP Introduction & Implicit Objects](lecture-23.qmd)
- [Lecture 24: JSP Scripting, Directives, Actions & Custom Tags](lecture-24.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 21-24)](/quiz/index.qmd)

### Unit IV: Spring Core Foundations
- [Lecture 25: Spring Core Basics & Dependency Injection](lecture-25.qmd)
- [Lecture 26: Spring IoC & Bean Life Cycle](lecture-26.qmd)
- [Lecture 27: Bean Scopes: Singleton, Prototype, Request, Session, Application](lecture-27.qmd)
- [Lecture 28: Autowiring & Annotations in Spring](lecture-28.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 25-28)](/quiz/index.qmd)

### Unit IV: Spring Design Patterns and Configuration
- [Lecture 29: Introduction to Design Patterns in Spring](lecture-29.qmd)
- [Lecture 30: Factory Design Pattern in Spring](lecture-30.qmd)
- [Lecture 31: Strategy Design Pattern in Spring](lecture-31.qmd)
- [Lecture 32: AOP & Bean Configuration Styles (XML and Annotation)](lecture-32.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 29-32)](/quiz/index.qmd)

### Unit V: Spring Boot and REST APIs
- [Lecture 33: Spring Boot Configuration & Setup](lecture-33.qmd)
- [Lecture 34: Spring Boot Annotations & Build Systems](lecture-34.qmd)
- [Lecture 35: Spring Boot Actuator, Runners & Logging](lecture-35.qmd)
- [Lecture 36: REST Controllers & Request Mapping](lecture-36.qmd)
- [Lecture 37: Request Body, Path Variable & Request Parameter](lecture-37.qmd)
- [Lecture 38: HTTP Methods & CRUD APIs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)](lecture-38.qmd)
- [Lecture 39: Spring Boot Code Structure & Best Practices](lecture-39.qmd)
- [Lecture 40: Final Revision & Hands-on Integration (Spring Boot + REST)](lecture-40.qmd)
- [Practice Quiz Set (Lectures 33-40)](/quiz/index.qmd)

---

## How to Use These Lectures

1. Click on any lecture link to view the lecture source
2. To present, render the Quarto file to RevealJS format
3. Use arrow keys to navigate slides
4. Press 'S' for speaker notes
5. Press 'F' for fullscreen

## Styling

All lectures use the custom SCSS theme from [course-slides-styles.scss](../course-slides-styles.scss), which is based on the UCSB-MEDS presentation template.
